findings.title: Command injection via exec.Command in ping endpoint
findings.description: User-supplied host parameter concatenated directly into exec.Command with sh -c without sanitization

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in DNS lookup helper
findings.description: Domain parameter passed through helper function into exec.Command with sh -c via fmt.Sprintf

findings.title: Multi-parameter command injection in log search shell pipeline
findings.description: Three user-controlled parameters interpolated into tail|grep shell pipeline via fmt.Sprintf with insufficient quoting

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in archive endpoint
findings.description: Path from JSON body embedded into tar command via fmt.Sprintf and exec.Command with shell execution

findings.title: Command injection via shell execution in port check
findings.description: Host parameter from JSON body embedded into nc command via fmt.Sprintf and exec.Command with shell execution

findings.title: Command injection via exec.Command in WHOIS lookup
findings.description: Domain parameter concatenated directly into exec.Command with sh -c without sanitization
